name: Ukrainian Localization
description:
This project has been meticulously developed and refined over the past two years, fueled by the invaluable help and feedback from the Ukrainian Rain World community.

I am thrilled to have come this far, and I know that without your unwavering support, this wouldn't have been possible. Huge thanks to:

- BrokenByteOfCode: For implementing the translation as a Steam Workshop modification.
- Eneyra, Lacki23 and Retnara: For proofreading and providing valuable feedback.
- nesysvetniy, sylverstace, 1Valentinovich and Tabaday: For testing early builds and helping fix translation errors.
- Kashak: For the initial spark of inspiration that started this journey.

Currently localized: Base game, Rain World Remix, More Slugcats, Jolly Co-Op, Expeditions, and The Watcher. Future plans include Inv Dating Sim and Developer Commentary.
